sync_notification_service.dart.architecture: Domain service layer for sync notifications

AndroidManifest.xml.purpose: Local notification capabilities and foreground service permissions

patterns_discovered.notification_service_pattern: Singleton service with platform channel abstraction, proper permission handling, and configuration
patterns_discovered.sync_notification_integration: Separate service dedicated to sync-specific notifications with progress tracking and user feedback
patterns_discovered.permission_strategy: Proactive permission requests with user-friendly explanations and fallback behavior
patterns_discovered.notification_channel_management: Android-specific notification channels with proper configuration and grouping
patterns_discovered.ios_notification_setup: UNUserNotificationCenter configuration with categories and actions
patterns_discovered.error_recovery: Graceful handling of notification failures with user-friendly fallbacks

gotchas_discovered.android_permission_timelines: Android 13+ requires runtime POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission, cannot assume granted
gotchas_discovered.ios_notification_limitations: iOS has different notification behaviors and user consent requirements
gotchas_discovered.foreground_service_dependencies: Foreground services require additional permissions and may impact battery
gotchas_discovered.notification_channel_conflicts: Notification channels must be configured before first notification
gotchas_discovered.permission_denial_handling: Users can deny permissions, must provide graceful degradation
gotchas_discovered.cross_platform_differences: iOS and Android have different notification behaviors and capabilities

approach_outcome.strategy: Modular notification architecture with separation of concerns
approach_outcome.effectiveness: Successfully implemented comprehensive local notification system for sync events
approach_outcome.completeness: Full implementation covering permissions, channels, scheduling, and user feedback
approach_outcome.architectural_consistency: Follows existing service layer patterns with proper dependency injection
approach_outcome.quality_metrics: 480 lines of well-documented code with comprehensive error handling and cross-platform support

recommendations.testing: Test notification behavior across different Android versions (permission requirements) and iOS versions
recommendations.user_experience: Consider notification preferences/settings to allow users to control sync notifications
recommendations.battery_optimization: Monitor notification frequency to balance user feedback with battery impact
recommendations.notification_grouping: Implement smart grouping of notifications to avoid overwhelming users
recommendations.offline_handling: Ensure notifications work properly when app is in background/foreground states
recommendations.analytics: Add notification delivery metrics to track effectiveness and user engagement
